lines.speaker: Boyfriend
lines.content: I made a reservation for us at this Italian restaurant. I heard the pasta here is amazing.
lines.cn: 我在这家意大利餐厅订了位。我听说这里的意面很棒。

lines.speaker: Girlfriend
lines.content: I have been wanting to try this place. The atmosphere is so romantic with the candlelight.
lines.cn: 我一直想来试试这家店。烛光下的氛围好浪漫。

lines.speaker: Boyfriend
lines.content: I am glad you like it. Would you like some wine, or would you prefer sparkling water?
lines.cn: 你喜欢就好。你想喝点红酒，还是气泡水？

lines.speaker: Girlfriend
lines.content: Just sparkling water for now. I want to enjoy the food with a clear head. What are you going to order?
lines.cn: 现在先气泡水吧。我想清醒地享受美食。你要点什么？

lines.speaker: Boyfriend
lines.content: I think I will get the seafood pasta. The waiter said it is the chef's special today.
lines.cn: 我想我要海鲜意面。服务员说今天是厨师特别推荐。

lines.speaker: Girlfriend
lines.content: That sounds delicious. I will go with the mushroom risotto. I love creamy dishes.
lines.cn: 听起来很美味。我要蘑菇烩饭。我喜欢奶油口味的菜。

lines.speaker: Boyfriend
lines.content: Perfect. Oh, I also ordered a tiramisu for us to share later. It is your favorite, right?
lines.cn: 完美。哦，我还点了一份提拉米苏我们待会儿分享。是你最喜欢的，对吧？

lines.speaker: Girlfriend
lines.content: You remembered! That is so sweet of you. This evening is already wonderful.
lines.cn: 你记得！你真好。这个晚上已经很美好了。

lines.speaker: Boyfriend
lines.content: I just wanted to make you happy. You work so hard, and you deserve a nice night out.
lines.cn: 我只是想让你开心。你工作那么辛苦，值得拥有一个美好的夜晚。

lines.speaker: Girlfriend
lines.content: Thank you, love. I feel really lucky to be here with you tonight.
lines.cn: 谢谢你，亲爱的。今晚能和你在一起，我真的觉得很幸运。
